power.method: 15000mAh rechargeable battery; DC 5V/2A or Imou 8W solar panel; <3.5W

features: sound + light alarm / red-blue warning lights
release_notes: 4K/8MP AOV pan/tilt. Specs from Imou's official spec-page embedded JSON (Wi-Fi variant). A separate 4G LTE AOV PT 4K SKU is advertised on store.imou.com. IP rating not stated for the 4K variant (Pro/Lite are IP66).

frigate.notes: 100% wire-free battery camera — it sleeps between events and does not expose a continuous local RTSP stream, so Frigate/local-NVR use is not supported. Recording is via the Imou Life app + cloud and on-device microSD.
